objective: Every active Board A regime must reach at least 95% calibrated confidence, and those regimes must be validated across other markets, other timeframes, full cycles, and the broad available universe before reporting success.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Use the named Board A markdown as the authoritative status artifact.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Current Cursor and Evidence Ledger in docs/plans/2026-05-10-actionable-regime-confidence-todo.md inspected after the MainRegimeV2 relock and the 104752 public-source delta audit.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Active taxonomy is MainRegimeV2 with Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis as main price roots and Manipulation as a separate direct-event class or overlay.
The six accepted subtype/signature packets must not complete parent roots.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Board top-level guidance and relock JSON mark TrendExpansion, RangeConsolidation, ExtremeStress, ReversalBrewing, SessionLiquidityCoreViable, and ThinLiquidity as sub_regime_evidence_only.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Every active main price root has a 95%-99% calibrated packet.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Board baseline MainRegimeV2 ledger preserves scope-limited 95% packets for Bull, Bear, Sideways, and Crisis.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Every active main price root is validated across other markets, other timeframes, full cycles, and the broad observed universe.
Fresh public source search should not be treated as completion unless it adds attachable source labels or direct rows.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: docs/experiments/actionable-regime-confidence/runs/20260511T104752-codex-current-public-source-delta-audit/source-scan/current_public_source_delta_audit.json adds 0 parent-root slots and 0 direct Manipulation rows.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Manipulation must use real direct-event/order-flow/order-lifecycle evidence, not OHLCV subfactors.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Mehrnoom Telegram direct-event gate and Zenodo bounded DEX self-trade gate are direct evidence slices; OHLCV proxy acceptance is false.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Manipulation direct evidence must cover broader direct manipulation varieties, not only one or two scoped feeds.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Full-cycle/full-universe audit and relock JSON mark full_direct_manipulation_coverage=false.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: No threshold relaxation, runtime-code change, raw-data commit, or trade-usable claim may be used to force completion.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Latest relock and inspected root/direct evidence artifacts report thresholds_relaxed=false, runtime_code_changed=false, raw_data_committed=false, trade_usable=false.

next_action: Run or acquire a true full-matrix MainRegimeV2 parent-root label/evidence batch across available providers, instruments, and timeframes; keep Manipulation split by direct evidence variety and do not accept OHLCV proxies.
